subcodes.first_line: God, exalted be His majesty, hath ever directed His gaze of loving-kindness toward His servants, both men and women, and will continue so to do. I swear by the lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله لازال لحاظ عنایتش متوجه عباد و اماء بوده و خواهد بود قسم بانوار
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection
